chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Hello, welcome to the video lecture series of optical communication.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: The subject code is REC 075 and here we are in lecture number 1.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: So what we have discussed in the previous lecture, in the previous lecture we talked

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: about what is the prescribed syllabus and the respective course outcome, what you will

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: learn after going through the complete subject.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Now in this lecture we are going to start what is the basic optical communication system.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: What we will study in this is called general system.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: What is the general system that we use for optical fiber or optical communication.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: So let us talk about optical communication.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Now what is optical communication?

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: What is optical communication?

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Now if I remove the word optical from the red, then you have read about communication.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: You have read about analog communication, about digital communication.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: So we know that is communication.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: And if I forget about the simple, so if I talk about communication, then what is required

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: in communication?

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: In communication, I require what is the input signal, then this input signal is transferred

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: over the channel.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Then this input signal is transferred over the channel and this is the output.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: We sometimes call input as source, from where we are sending, this is the source and generator

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: is the channel and through this channel, the signal is generated via source and this

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: will be transferred to the receiver.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: The output end is called receiver.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: So this is the basic communication system.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Now if I talk about the same communication system, then what is communication system

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: in general?

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: That is similar to our basic concept to any type of communication system.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: If you talk about optical communication, then this is similar to basic concept to

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: any type of communication system.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Now what is the definition of communication system?

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: The main function is to convey the signal from the information source over the transmission

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: medium to the destination.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: From information source to destination, we have to convey our signal and over the transmission

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: medium.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Like this time, I am the generator, I am the source and you are the receiver and we are

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: using a medium online through which I am talking to you and you are listening.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: So that is called basically communication.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Now if I use the word optical, then if I represent a basic communication system, then how is

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: basic communication represented?

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: One is called the information source from where the actual physical signal is generated.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: One is called the destination where the actual receiver receives the signal and this is the

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: transmission medium communication system.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: One is called the transmitter and this is also called the modulator.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: What is a modulator?

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Why is a modulator required?

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Can anyone tell me?

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Do you remember?

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Modulator is used when the information source is in a very low amplitude and there is a

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: very high light signal.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: So we modulate the frequency and amplitude of the information source so that our signal

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: is generated for this particular medium and it can be propagated over this medium.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: For example, if I speak very slowly, then my voice will not reach you.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: So that means if I put an amplifier or a modulator in front of my voice, then it will increase

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: my voice so that when the voice is transferred to the medium, then this medium itself has

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: losses.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: All you have to know is what happens in the medium, there are losses.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: So if we do not modulate, then our original signal will be lost very quickly without using

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: the modulator.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: So that's why we prefer modulation.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Then we transfer it to the medium and when we reach the receiver end, then we put a

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: demodulator on the receiver.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: That means the modulated signal will be demodulated and after demodulation, we will get the original

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: signal back.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: That original signal is given to our receiver.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: So this is basically called a basic communication system where there is an information source,

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: a transmitter, this is your modulator part, then your signal is transferred through the

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: medium, then at the time of receiver, this is receiver demodulator which will give the

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: original signal to your receiver.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: So this is a basic communication system.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Now if I am talking about optical, then what changes will happen in optical?

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Now this modulator is changed.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Now I have to bring something here which will convert my electrical signal into optical

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: signal.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: I have to bring electrical to optical conversion.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Because this medium will convert into optical fiber.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: So optical fiber, because it passes on the optic rays, I have to put electrical to optical

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: conversion.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Similarly, modulator will be left, along with electrical to optical conversion.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Similarly, when we reach the receiver end, I need demodulator, but before that I have

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: to put a system which converts your optical signal into electrical signal.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Optical to electrical conversion.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: So what will be our system?

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: We will call it optical communication system.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: So let's see what changes will happen in the block diagram.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: So here, this is your basic block diagram.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Information source, transmitter, transmission medium, receiver, and destination.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Now if I want to convert this into optical, then there is no change in the information

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: source and destination.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Now as I said, this transmitter modulator is converted into two stages.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Basically what are the two stages?

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: One is called electric transmit.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: And the other is called modulator.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: And this is the optical source.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: This is the optical source which you will read in detail.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: But here, just to remember as a function, this converts your electrical signal to optical

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: signal.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Optical source converts electrical to optical signal.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: And what are the examples of optical source?

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: We will study LED, laser, these types of optical sources we studied in unit number 3.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: As I told you in lecture 0, introduction.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Similarly, if you look at receiver cut point,

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Now, what is the second one?

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Transmission medium.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: So what is the replacement of transmission medium?

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Transmission medium is replaced by optical fiber cable.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Now this is optical fiber cable.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: You will read in detail in unit number 2,

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: that what are the optical fibers and losses in optical fibers.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: So this is my transmission medium.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: That is optical fiber.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: That's why I required optical source.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Because optical fiber can only transfer optic rays.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: That's why I had to convert electrical to optical.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: So from here, you will be transmitted through optical fiber.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Then you will be an optical detector.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Now optical detector just performs the opposite operation of optical source.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: What did optical source do?

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Electrical to optical.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Optical to optical conversion.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: And what will it do?

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Optical to electrical conversion.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: It means it converts optical signal back to electrical signal.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Optical detector.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Here we will study PIN, photo detector,

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: There are different types of optical detectors that you will study in unit number 4.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: After that, there is electrical receive.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Now this will perform a function of demodulator.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: So this will perform the function of demodulation.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: This will demodulate the electrical signal that has been converted.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: And then it will give to the destination part that is our receiver.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: So if I talk about the working of all these,

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: The working of a single line,

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Like if I talk about information source,

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: So what is the functioning of information source?

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Information source provides an electrical signal to the transmitter for transmission.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Right?

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Information source will give me an electrical signal or physical signal.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: That is given electrical signal to the transmitter for transmission.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: That what signal I have to transmit.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Then if we talk about the transmission stage,

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Transmitter stage, and it will convert it into two parts.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: One is called electric transmit,

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: One is called optical source.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: So what is the function of electric transmit?

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: This is an electrical stage which drives an optical source

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: to give modulation of the light wave carrier.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: So this will simply perform the functioning of modulation.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: This works to do the modulation of electrical signal.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: And when the signal is modulated,

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Then it will apply to the optical source.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: The optical source which is used to convert the electrical signal to optical signal,

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: This is the main function of your optical source,

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Electrical to optical signal conversion.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: This may be either a semiconductor laser or LED,

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Which we will study in detail.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: But here I just need one line definition

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: That all the representation we have done in this block,

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: What is the basic working of each and every block?

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Okay?

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: So next thing was transmission medium.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: What does the transmission medium do?

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: The medium consists of an optical fiber cable,

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Which transmits the optical signal to the receiver.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Then similarly the receiver stage,

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Receiver stage again based on two parts,

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: One is called the optical detector,

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: One is called the electrical receive.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: What does the optical detector do?

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Optical detector is used to convert the optical signal to electrical signal.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Just opposite from your optical source.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Like photodiodes, we have pin diode, PI diode,

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Or avalanche photodiodes,

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Photoconductors are there,

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Phototransistors are there,

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Are utilized for the detection of the optical signals,

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: And the optical electrical conversion.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Okay?

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Then there is the electrical receive.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: This is an electrical stage which drives by an optical detector

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: To give demodulation of the optical carrier signal.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Okay?

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: So, in a way,

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Demodulation will be done by electrical receive.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: That's why I told you,

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: You have to remember the function of each line from the block diagram,

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Which stage has which function.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: So, after seeing this lecture,

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: You will understand very well,

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: What is the optical communication system?

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: How are the blocks installed in it?

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: And what is the working of each block and each component?

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Okay?

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Now, you can again see the video.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: You can watch the video again.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: And if you like it,

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Then, please subscribe to my channel.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: So that you will get the information about the upcoming videos.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Okay?

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Thank you.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: So, let's meet in the next lecture,

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Where we will talk about the advantages of optical fiber communication.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Okay.

chunks.title: Optical Communica
chunks.text: Thank you.
